string 2:
I wanted to be a star all across the Digital World,
so I left the sea to come work here.

But there's not a single fan in this place who
appreciates my talents or fawns over me.

*sigh* I wish I could just stop and take a break
from all of this!
{next}It's important to put in the legwork.
{next}You could stop and take a break.
{next}I could fawn over you.

I've already put in PLENTY of legwork!
I do have fans, you know!

No, that'd just be irresponsible. You think I don't know
what they say? No work, no eat.

However much you were to try, your efforts alone
wouldn't be enough to fill my heart.

Ah, but I've reached my limit. I can't go on...
How I long for the scent of the sea...

Wait. What's this? A dainty bottle? How perfect!
Could you go fill it with seawater?
{next}Sure thing.
{next}Why don't you go yourself?
{next}The sea is at peace now.

Why, you didn't give that a second thought. Could it be
you're a fan of mine?

Oh, no, no, no. This is the sort of thing that's important
to receive as a gift.

I swore I'd make a name for myself outside of the sea area.
I can't go back until I do.

Anyway, I long for the scent of the sea! So take that bottle
and go! Bring me seawater!
And, please, be quick about it.

*sigh* This is the worst... I'm so tired, and thirsty, and
homesick...

Next time, bring me the real deal! I should never have drunk
such weird-tasting seawater!
My, but that looks amazing! What is it? Water?

Ah... The scent of this water reminds me of home. I'm going
to drink it right now!

It smells... kind of funny, for ordinary water. But I am
thirsty, so it'll have to do.
Blech! *splutter*
Blech!

What is this slop?! Ugh, it's awful! This must be from the
ocean surface!

It's so bitter and sooooour! How could you make me drink
that swill?! Gross!

Seawater's taste is all about location. Now, go get me some
water worthy of my palette!
{next}Yeah, it's from the surface... So what?
{next}Isn't it all the same?
{next}Aren't you being a little emo?

Don't you give me that! I wanted you to get me seawater from
the ocean deeps!

No! There's all kinds of seawater! The type I want is cool
and clear from the ocean deeps!

Wrong! The cool, clear water of the ocean deeps would make
me feel emo, not this trash!

Ugh... This stinks! I hate my life! Can no one do me even
the simplest favor?

Everything... Everything is awful! I can't take it
anymooooooore!
{next}Feel better now?
{next}What's gotten into you?
{next}You actually seem all right now.

How could I possibly be feeling better? My throat and my
heart have been torn to shreds!
Don't you give me that! You know better than anyone!

Don't be ridiculous! Or... wait. You mean you think I'd make
a convincing actress?

Not one thing has gone my way since I came here. Maybe I
shouldn't have left the ocean.

The scent of surf still lingers in my mind... Ah, how I long
for the sea...
{next}Then let's go back.
{next}Want to take another drink?
{next}Then we'd better get to the forest!

Not a chance! That'd be like giving up just because things
didn't go my way!

Absolutely not! I shouldn't have drunk that lukewarm surface
water in the first place.

Why would you say that?! This is where you're supposed to
comfort the lonely young star.

Having left home to seek fame and fortune, it would break my
heart to return with nothing.

I was so sure the winds that howl far across the sea would
blow my loneliness away...

My brilliance is lost upon the blind, yet my luster remains.
Ah, my character is sublime!
{next}Let's go back to the sea.
{next}Your fans are all waiting for you.
{next}*sigh*

Perhaps that would be best. Instead of suffer for my pride,
I should go where I long to be.

Come to think of it, they're also all in the sea. Perhaps
that truly is where I belong!

Hey! You're not supposed to sigh! I just need to hear one
more word of encouragement!
My mind is made up! I will return to the sea!

That is the only place for me. Best to accept that and begin
anew as an underwater star.

Right. Having made up my mind, I'd better act fast. May we
meet again beneath the waves!

Oh! You're the one who got me that seawater. It's thanks to
you I decided to come home.

I wouldn't be where I am now if not for you. I got something
for you in case we met again.

Here. I want you to have this! I hope now you'll become a
fan of mine!

You filled the Dainty Bottle with clean seawater. Take it
back to MarineAngemon.

You filled the Dainty Bottle with funky seawater. Take it
back to MarineAngemon.

The Dainty Bottle is already full of
seawater. Replace what's inside?
[Replace it.]
{end}[Don't do anything.]

Bring me seawater that smells of home! It's not all the
same. I want good, clean water!
